ddls:
CREATE TABLE "yearly_stats" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "number_of_professionals_added" INTEGER /* Number of professionals added in the given year */,
  "total_number_of_pros" INTEGER /* Total number of professionals at the end of the given year */,
  "number_of_active_pros" INTEGER /* Number of active professionals at the end of the given year */,
  "number_of_non_active_pros" INTEGER /* Number of non-active professionals at the end of the given year */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of professionals compared to the previous year */,
  "active_to_non_active_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of active to non-active professionals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the member */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the member */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the member */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the member */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the member joined the association */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the member (active, non-active) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professional_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each professional category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the professional category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the professional category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_categories" (
  "member_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member-category relationship */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional category */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the member was certified in the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_categories_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES professional_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., conference attendance, training completion) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "hours_spent" INTEGER /* Number of hours spent on the activity */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Number of points earned for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, data analyst, member) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level of the role (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member (if the user is a member) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_status_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change log */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the status change */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the member */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the member */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_status_changes_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "issuing_organization" TEXT /* Issuing organization of the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  "certification_type" TEXT /* Type of certification (e.g., professional, academic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_certifications_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program in hours */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned for completing the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_training" (
  "member_training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member-training relationship */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the member completed the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_training_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_training_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)
